title: muehlenbeckia axillaris
intro: Muehlenbeckia axillaris, also known as Maidenhair Vine or Lasiocarpa, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polygonaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Muehlenbeckia axillaris include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and provide relief from digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used in infusions, teas, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
